articles.title: Russian jets 'dangerously' intercept RAF spy plane over Black Sea
articles.description: The unarmed Rivet Joint surveillance aircraft was conducting a "routine international flight" during the incidents, the Ministry of Defence says.

articles.title: TikTok and YouTube 'not safe enough' for kids, says Ofcom
articles.description: YouTube said it worked with experts to provide appropriate experiences. TikTok said it was disappointed Ofcom had not acknowledged its safety features.

articles.title: Why illegal children's homes are being paid up to £2m per child by councils
articles.description: A ban was meant to bring an end to the practice - but councils continue to fund illegal placements.

articles.title: UK agrees £3.7bn trade deal with six Gulf states
articles.description: The deal will remove an estimated £580m worth of tariffs from British exports, but rights groups are critical
